inputs: Question dropdown (Q1 of N with preview)

fields_displayed: Per-slot score cards (Model A/B/C/D with score and explanation)

contestant_configuration.how_slots_are_selected: User assigns model per slot via ModelSelectorSlot in header; dashboardModelA/B/C/D stores; slots active by arenaPanelCount (1-4)
contestant_configuration.temperature_handling: Per-slot from getSettingsForSlot(slot): mergeEffectiveSettings(globalDefault getEffectiveSettingsForModel modelId arenaSlotOverrides); temperature passed to streamChatCompletion in sendToSlot
contestant_configuration.model_loading_logic: Sequential one at a time: unloadAllModelsNative at run start; load first contestant; for each slot sendToSlot then unloadModel(slot) waitUntilUnloaded then loadModel(next); after last unload judge loads for scoring then unloads

steps: User sets categories and question count in right panel
User toggles Internet Access (Judge) ON or OFF on bar
If Internet ON: searchDuckDuckGo for categories query formatSearchResultForChat urls logged
parseGeneratedQuestionSet(content) with fenced trim and balanced-array slice
If parse fails: buildArenaJsonRepairPrompt second requestChatCompletion temperature 0.2
On still fail: lastFailedBuildRaw set for Repair JSON button
Alternative: Import questions manual paste parseQuestionsAndAnswers normalizeGeneratedQuestionSet

question_source.where_questions_come_from: Built set from Build Arena or manual Import (parseQuestionsAndAnswers); builtQuestionSet.questions
question_source.answer_key_source: builtQuestionSet.answers indexed by questionIndex; currentQuestionAnswer derived from parsedAnswers[questionIndex]

contestant_phase.load_sequence: unloadAllModelsNative then waitUntilUnloaded(loadedBefore 25s); load first selected contestant; for each slot after sendToSlot unload current then load next
contestant_phase.unload_sequence: After each sendToSlot unloadModel(s.modelId) waitUntilUnloaded 15s; after last contestant unload before loading judge
contestant_phase.retry_logic: maxAttempts 2 per slot; on failure setSlotError and push to failedSlots; continue to next slot
contestant_phase.timeout_logic: ARENA_TIMEOUT_MS 120000; setTimeout controller.abort in sendToSlot; on AbortError return undefined and sanitize partial content
contestant_phase.memory_verification_logic: getLoadedModelKeys after unloadAllModelsNative; waitUntilUnloaded(loadedBefore pollIntervalMs 400 timeoutMs 25000)

judge_phase.blind_review: Controlled by arenaBlindReview store; when true buildJudgePromptBlind used and shuffleArray(slotsWithResponses shuffleRandom) with makeSeededRandom(arenaCurrentRunMeta.seed)
judge_phase.shuffle_logic: shuffleArray(slotsWithResponses shuffleRandom) in buildJudgePromptBlind; responseOrder returned; parseBlindJudgeScores maps Response N to slot via responseOrder
judge_phase.score_parser_function: parseBlindJudgeScoresMerged when blind else parseJudgeScoresMerged; optional requestChatCompletion buildJudgeScoreExtractionPrompt if still empty; parseJudgeScoresAndExplanations for Copy JSON explanations
judge_phase.failure_behavior: judgmentPopup Re-parse and AI re-extract buttons; on parse failure judgmentPopup with scores {} explanation raw output; finally clearTimeout judgeTimeoutId unload judge waitUntilUnloaded

data_and_state.logging_behavior: Console log Arena run start run_id seed question_index; console log Arena run metadata with run_id seed question_index deterministic_judge blind_review model_list judge_model responses scores; console error Arena judge_failure on parse failure or catch with raw_output run_id; Build Arena stores builtQuestionSetMeta with run_id tool_calls urls_accessed timestamps

feature_flags.blind_review: arenaBlindReview store persisted localStorage arenaBlindReview default true; right panel Execution checkbox
feature_flags.deterministic_judge: arenaDeterministicJudge store persisted arenaDeterministicJudge default true; right panel Execution checkbox; when true judge temperature 0
feature_flags.internet_access: arenaBuilderInternetEnabled for Phase 1 Build Arena only persisted default false; arenaWebSearchMode none/all for judge scoring phase web context; webSearchForNextMessage for chat send

known_limitations: Judge has no LM Studio tools; Internet ON injects our search into prompt
Contestants never get internet unless globe and arenaWebSearchMode used for send
One model loaded at a time during run
AI re-extract and Repair JSON require a working judge model and API

what_they_assert: parseQuestionsAndAnswers empty numbered Q/A JSON separate blocks plain list robustness
sanitizeContestantResponse Model X Response N think
buildJudgePromptBlind buildJudgePrompt answer key web custom instructions feedback
pickJudgeModel largest non-contestant user choice contestant fallback all contestants prefer instruct
